title: Caldera - System Owner Discovery via whoami and query Commands (Windows)
description: Process-creation level detection of whoami.exe, query.exe, and net user for identity and session enumeration. Caldera T1033 emulation immediately runs whoami /all to determine privilege level and group memberships, and query user to list active sessions. This binary-level rule complements the discovery-category rule that uses CommandLine matching.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\whoami.exe') or ('Process Name' like '*\\whoami.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*/all*' or 'Command Line' like '*/priv*' or 'Command Line' like '*/groups*')) or ('Process Name' like '*\\query.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*user*' or 'Command Line' like '*session*')))
falsepositives: Help desk tools checking session state
